notes:
Codex review pass + CR4 cache validator + JANGTQ_K mixed-bit fix.

Cache safety: cache_record_validator.py (NEW) hard-rejects malformed paged/L2 cache records before they reach mx.concatenate / cache.state assignment. Per-tensor cap 4GB, per-record cap 16GB, per-dim cap 256K, layer-count cross-check. Closes the entire 555GB/468GB [metal::malloc] crash class. 10 regression tests pass including test_468gb_corruption_rejected.

/v1/responses correctness: force-thinking + low/medium/high → high mapping was at the wrong endpoint in v1.5.22 (chat-completions). Now at server.py:7547 (the real Responses route). Streaming finalizer no longer leaks reasoning into output_text when reasoning_was_streamed=True. Panel SSE consumer falls back to response.output_text.done / response.content_part.done / response.completed.output[*] when no deltas arrived (was: blank-message → history rebuild skip → consecutive-user-merge → wrong-prompt replay).

rep_penalty floor: refactored to enforce 1.15 family floor on stale UI 1.0 + bundle 1.0 + CLI default. Only genuine non-stale explicit values bypass.

Console-script shebangs: /Applications/vMLX.app/Contents/Resources/bundled-python/python/bin/{vmlx,vmlx-serve,vmlx-engine} now point inside the installed app (was pointing to dev source path → broken on user installs).

Companion: PyPI jang 2.5.26 ships JANGTQ_K mixed-bit fast-path fix (gate=2/up=2/down=4 was dequantizing down_proj at gate's bit width → garbled multilingual salad on MiniMax-M2.7-JANGTQ_K) + jangtq_hydrate hard-fail on missing modules + 3-bit in_features correction.

Not in this release: real TurboQuant KV codec (encoder/decoder kernels for typed turboquant_kv records, 6 round-trip tests) — Phase 2, design at docs/TURBOQUANT_KV_CACHE_CODEC_PLAN.md. JIT/sleep/wake matrix verification — Phase 2. DSV4 long-context drift on JANGTQ2 uniform 2-bit bundles is bundle-quality (V3 mixed-bit converter rebuild in flight separately).

Schema unchanged from v1.5.22 (paged_n1_keys_v3 / deepseek_v4_v7); existing L2 disk caches keep working.
